name: Dagger of Venom
overview: A magical dagger with a bonus to attacks and the ability to coat itself with poison.

properties.attack_bonus: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon

poison_coating.activation: You can take a Bonus Action to magically coat the blade with poison
poison_coating.duration: The poison remains for 1 minute or until an attack using this weapon hits a creature

effect.condition: Poisoned for 1 minute on failed save

poison_coating.recharge: The weapon can't be used this way again until the next dawn
